---
title: ""
image: "../../images/py_kurs_cover04.webp"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

<br>

::: {.d-flex .gap-2}
[Home](../../index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[Python Overview](../index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[1](./01basics1.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[2](./02basics2.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[3](./03basics3.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[4](./04basics4.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[5](./05pandas1.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[6](./06pandas2.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[7](./07Visualisations.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[8](./08WrapUp_Refresher.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[9](./09QA_SampleExam.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

# Week 4: Python Basics IV
*The foundation of your Python journey.*

::: {layout-ncol=1}
### (Fundamentals)
* [**Python Classes/Objects**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_classes.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Inheritance**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_inheritance.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Scope**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_scope.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python String Formatting**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_string_formatting.asp){.new-tab}

### (Test your Understanding)
* **Python Basics III-IV**

### (Jupyter Notebook)
* **Introduction Jupyter Notebook**

### (Old Exam Questions)
* [**Python Basics**](https://github.com/STADS-Mannheim/python-course-2025/tree/main/Week_04_Old_Exam_Questions){.new-tab}
:::

<br>

### Material

::: {layout-ncol=1}
* [**Jupyter Notebook Introductory Slides**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/assets/docs/jupyter_notebook_slides.pdf){.new-tab}
* [**Jupyter Notebook Demo**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/assets/docs/jupyter_notebook_demo.ipynb){.new-tab}
:::

<br>

### Additional Material

These pages from the w3schools Python Tutorial are not exam relevant, but I recommend checking them out:

::: {layout-ncol=1}
* [**Python Try...Except**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_try_except.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python RegEx**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_regex.asp){.new-tab}
:::

<br>

## Resources

::: {layout-ncol=2}
[GitHub Repo](https://www.github.com/STADS-Mannheim/python-course-2025/tree/main){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg .w-100 .new-tab}

[w3schools Tutorial](https://www.w3schools.com/python/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg .w-100 .new-tab}
:::
